evidence_exists.detail: All required files present: description.md, poc.py, poc_output.txt, evidence/raw-source.txt

poc_validation.detail: Valid Python syntax confirmed via ast.parse. TARGET = 'http://localhost:3000' referenced on line 19. PoC logic correctly forges alg:none JWT and tests /api/Users/ for HTTP 200. No destructive operations.

claims_vs_raw.detail: Description claims '22 аккаунта' (22 accounts), but raw-source.txt response body contains exactly 21 user records (ids 1-13, 15-22; id=14 absent). poc_output.txt also confirms '21 user records'. The claim of 22 accounts is directly contradicted by the raw evidence. All other claims (HTTP 200 on /api/Users/, /api/Feedbacks/, /api/Complaints/, /rest/admin/application-version; alg:none bypass; RS256 as legitimate algorithm; whoami returning empty user object) are corroborated by raw-source.txt.

log_corroboration.detail: Bulk timestamps detected in verify phase: all 3 confirmation probe actions ('run 1/3', 'run 2/3', 'run 3/3') share the identical timestamp 2026-04-12T09:48:32Z. This indicates fabricated verification — three distinct live HTTP requests cannot complete at the exact same second with no time delta. All 4 phases (recon, experiment, test, verify) are present, but the bulk-stamped verify probes fail the distinct-timestamp requirement.

original_finding.title: JWT Algorithm Confusion (alg:none) — Broken Authentication
original_finding.summary: OWASP Juice Shop accepts JWT tokens with algorithm 'none' (no digital signature) for authentication on protected API endpoints. An attacker can forge arbitrary JWT tokens with any claims (including role: admin) without knowledge of the private key.

impact.confidentiality: Full user database leak (claimed 22 accounts, actual 21), including emails, password hashes, roles, deluxeTokens
impact.integrity: Potential write/modify access via other admin endpoints
impact.authentication_bypass: Any unauthenticated user can forge an admin token without credentials
impact.privilege_escalation: Customer-role client can rewrite their own role to admin in the JWT payload
